---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem would this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the behavior, command, file contract, or workflow.

## Alternatives

What can users do today?

## Compatibility

Does this affect CLI behavior, report schemas, generated scaffold paths, proof lanes, or agent-facing policy?
